requirementGroup.label: major Elective Credit (5 credits)
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: The Washington State Legislative Intern Program provides an excellent opportunity for students to learn about the legislative process while gaining professional work experience during the annual legislative session. Students accepted to this program enroll in TPOLS 497 Political Internship in State Government, a graded course that meets the capstone requirement and can also satisfy up to 5 credits of major electives. Contact the Washington State Legislative Internship coordinator for more information: libisun@uw.edu .
requirementGroup.sourceRowText: The Washington State Legislative Intern Program provides an excellent opportunity for students to learn about the legislative process while gaining professional work experience during the annual legislative session. Students accepted to this program enroll in TPOLS 497 Political Internship in State Government, a graded course that meets the capstone requirement and can also satisfy up to 5 credits of major electives. Contact the Washington State Legislative Internship coordinator for more information: libisun@uw.edu .
notes: Program-specific approved bucket; do not satisfy with generic Area of Inquiry category matching unless an approved filter also backs the course.
